candidate_fit_rule: freshly refit all eight frozen configurations; no A9c3 fit is reused as an A9c4 fit

context_correction.scope: event-law context marginals only; occurrence, amount, daily temperature, storm descriptors, hierarchy, and dependence structures are unchanged

evidence_completeness.candidate_history_role: A9c3 candidate availability is decomposed and published for diagnosis only; it cannot select a retained cell
evidence_completeness.excluded_cell_role: report_only_not_evaluated; publish source counts and no candidate or baseline selection score
evidence_completeness.prospective_mask_rule: retain a non-storm mandatory cell exactly when at least two stations in its stratum have available observed features and at least one available faithful feature in each frozen audit burn; storm and engineering cells retain the A9c3 rules
evidence_completeness.candidate_gate: every retained mandatory cell must have at least two candidate stations available in every burn used by the stage; otherwise the configuration is incomplete
evidence_completeness.breadth_guard: each non-engineering objective family must retain at least one mandatory cell in every originally applicable stratum; winter_proxy applies only to cold; otherwise HOLD-A9C4-COMPLETENESS-SURFACE

inherited_unchanged.grouped_storm_estimator: A9c3 equal-weight two-site estimator and actual event frequencies
inherited_unchanged.thresholds: A9c3 candidate-blind family-by-horizon thresholds and storm component scales

hypotheses.rule: the pre-output audit fully decomposes every A9c3 short-screen mandatory cell and freezes a breadth-complete candidate-blind mask
all A9c4 generated event context values satisfy structural solar, wind, and humidity support with no output repair
both actual classes retain at least one fresh valid fit and remain structurally non-isomorphic
the frozen selector identifies at most one class after rejecting hard failures, incomplete retained mandatory evidence, and material degradation
zero locked confirmation station-year series are accessed
